title: Admin signs in
summary: Admin submits the password form on /login. A Server Action verifies it against ADMIN_PASSWORD and sets an httpOnly admin_session=1 cookie before redirecting to /admin. A wrong password redirects back to /login?error=1.

steps.label: POST password (Server Action)
steps.note: form action={login} invokes the Server Action.

steps.label: compare to ADMIN_PASSWORD
steps.note: Plain equality check against the env var. Single-admin design — no users table.

steps.label: Set-Cookie: admin_session=1
steps.payload: httpOnly, sameSite: lax, secure in prod, 7-day maxAge
steps.note: httpOnly so client JS can't read it; secure so it's HTTPS-only in production.

steps.label: redirect → /admin
steps.note: Successful path. Wrong password instead redirects to /login?error=1.

steps.label: GET /admin (next request)
steps.note: Subsequent admin navigation now passes the proxy gate — see proxy-auth-gate flow.
